name: Jupiter

model.note: Perps = Binance Futures volume × JUP/Binance perps share × clean take-rate; spot = Binance spot volume × JUP/Binance spot share × rake. 50% of modeled GP used for buybacks; 0 scheduled unlocks until Jupiter announces reserve plan.

current_gp.perps_volume_source: fallback: JUP Perps clean GP / 1.50bps clean take-rate
current_gp.binance_futures_proxy_method: BTCUSDT futures quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance Futures totals
current_gp.binance_spot_proxy_method: BTCUSDT spot quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance spot totals

caveats: JUP Perps direct DefiLlama derivatives volume is not available from the public summary endpoint in this environment; perps numerator falls back to clean-GP-implied volume unless a live dailyVolume series is returned.
Jupiter aggregator volume falls back to fee-implied volume if the public DEX summary endpoint does not expose dailyVolume for the aggregator slug.

secondary_chart.label: Historical perps GP buyback horizon
secondary_chart.subtitle: Years to buy circ supply at 50% of annualised perps GP
secondary_chart.note: Uses trailing 30D JUP Perps fees × 25% take × 50% buyback share. Perps GP only; spot GP excluded.
